info.name: SkillMentor API
info.description:
# SkillMentor REST API

Complete API collection for the SkillMentor online mentoring platform.

---

## Quick Setup

1. Import `SkillMentor.postman_environment.json` alongside this file.
2. Select **SkillMentor – Dev** from the environment dropdown (top-right).
3. Set `clerk_token` to a valid Clerk JWT ( run `await window.Clerk.session.getToken()` in your browser console on the frontend).
4. Call **POST Users › Sync Current User** first to seed your user into the DB.

---

## Authentication

All endpoints (except Swagger & Health) require a Clerk JWT.
Every request in this collection automatically inherits `Authorization: Bearer {{clerk_token}}`.

To test role-restricted endpoints, paste the appropriate token into `clerk_token`.

| Environment Variable | Role |
|---|---|
| `admin_token` | ADMIN |
| `mentor_token` | MENTOR |
| `student_token` | STUDENT |

---

## Roles Reference

| Role | Description |
|---|---|
| `USER` | Default after sign-up. Must complete onboarding first |
| `STUDENT` | Can browse mentors, enrol in sessions, track learning |
| `MENTOR` | Manages own profile, subjects, and sessions |
| `ADMIN` | Full platform control — all endpoints |

---

## Error Response Shape

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Descriptive error message",
  "errors": { "fieldName": "Validation message" },
  "timestamp": "2026-03-04T10:00:00Z",
  "path": "/api/sessions"
}
```

---

## Base URL

`{{base_url}}` → defaults to `http://localhost:8080`

item.name: 🔧 System
item.description: Health check and API documentation endpoints. **No authentication required.**

request.description:
Spring Boot Actuator health endpoint. Returns `{"status": "UP"}` when the server and database are healthy.

**Auth:** None required

Opens the interactive Swagger UI. Best viewed in a browser.

**Auth:** None required

Returns the full OpenAPI 3.0 specification as JSON.

**Auth:** None required

item.name: 👤 Users
item.description:
User synchronization and profile retrieval.

The `/sync` endpoint must be called after a user's first login, or after any role change, to upsert their Clerk identity into the local PostgreSQL database.

request.description:
Reads the authenticated user's Clerk JWT and upserts their record (email, name, roles, profile image) in the local database.

**Call this after every login or role change before hitting other endpoints.**

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns** `UserDTO`:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "clerkId": "user_2abc123",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "firstName": "Jane",
  "lastName": "Doe",
  "fullName": "Jane Doe",
  "roles": ["STUDENT"],
  "profileImageUrl": "https://img.clerk.com/...",
  "onboardingCompleted": true,
  "lastLogin": "2026-03-04T10:00:00"
}
```

Fetches the local database record for the currently authenticated user by their Clerk ID.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns** `UserDTO`

item.name: 🚀 Onboarding
item.description:
New-user onboarding flow and role management.

**Typical flow for a new user:**
1. User signs up via Clerk → given default role `USER`
2. Frontend calls `GET /api/onboarding/status` to check if onboarding is needed
3. User selects a role → Frontend calls `POST /api/onboarding/complete`
4. Frontend calls `POST /api/users/sync` to refresh the DB record
5. Clerk JWT now carries the new role in every subsequent request

request.description:
Checks whether the current user has completed onboarding in both the DB and Clerk.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns:**
```json
{
  "completed": true,
  "clerkId": "user_2abc123",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "roles": ["STUDENT"]
}
```

Assigns a role to the authenticated user and marks onboarding as complete. Throws `400 Bad Request` if called a second time on an already-onboarded user.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user (must NOT already be onboarded)

**Request body:**

| Field | Type | Required | Accepted values |
|---|---|---|---|
| `role` | string | ✅ | `STUDENT` \| `MENTOR` \| `ADMIN` \| `USER` |

**Returns** `OnboardingResponse`:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Onboarding completed successfully",
  "userId": "1",
  "clerkId": "user_2abc123",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "roles": ["STUDENT"]
}
```

Returns the roles currently assigned to the authenticated user, read directly from Clerk public metadata.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns:**
```json
{
  "clerkId": "user_2abc123",
  "email": "jane@example.com",
  "roles": ["MENTOR"]
}
```

Overrides the roles of any user by their Clerk ID. Updates Clerk public metadata directly.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` only

> ⚠️ Paste `{{admin_token}}` into `clerk_token` before calling this.

**Request body:**

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `clerkId` | string | ✅ | Target user's Clerk ID (starts with `user_`) |
| `roles` | string[] | ✅ | `["ADMIN"]` \| `["MENTOR"]` \| `["STUDENT"]` \| `["USER"]` |

**Returns** `OnboardingResponse`:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "User roles updated successfully",
  "clerkId": "user_2xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx",
  "roles": ["MENTOR"]
}
```

item.name: 🧑‍🏫 Mentors
item.description:
Mentor profile CRUD.

GET endpoints have no role restriction at the controller level, but `SecurityConfig` requires a valid JWT for all `/api/**` paths. Write operations are restricted to `ADMIN` or `MENTOR`.

request.description:
Returns all mentor profiles with linked user information.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns** `MentorDTO[]`:
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "userId": 2,
    "clerkId": "user_2abc123",
    "firstName": "Rohan",
    "lastName": "Silva",
    "email": "rohan@example.com",
    "fullName": "Rohan Silva",
    "phoneNumber": "+94771234567",
    "title": "Senior Software Engineer",
    "profession": "Software Engineering",
    "company": "Tech Corp",
    "experienceYears": 5,
    "bio": "Passionate about clean architecture...",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-01T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-04T08:00:00"
  }
]
```

Returns a single mentor profile.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Path variable:** `mentor_id` — update in environment

**Returns** `MentorDTO`

Returns all sessions linked to a specific mentor.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR` | `STUDENT`

**Path variable:** `mentor_id`

**Returns** `SessionDTO[]`

body.raw:
{
  "phoneNumber": "+94771234567",
  "title": "Senior Software Engineer",
  "profession": "Software Engineering",
  "company": "Tech Corp (Pvt) Ltd",
  "experienceYears": 5,
  "bio": "Passionate backend engineer specialising in Spring Boot and distributed systems."
}

request.description:
Creates a mentor profile linked to the JWT owner's user account.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Request body — field constraints:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `phoneNumber` | string | ✅ | Valid Sri Lankan mobile: `+94XXXXXXXXX` or `07XXXXXXXX` |
| `title` | string | ✅ | 2–20 characters (e.g. `"Senior Engineer"`) |
| `profession` | string | ✅ | 2–50 characters |
| `company` | string | ✅ | 2–60 characters |
| `experienceYears` | int | ✅ | 0–50 |
| `bio` | string | ❌ | Max 500 characters |

**Returns** `MentorDTO` with HTTP `201 Created`

body.raw:
{
  "phoneNumber": "+94771234567",
  "title": "Lead Software Engineer",
  "profession": "Software Engineering",
  "company": "Tech Corp (Pvt) Ltd",
  "experienceYears": 7,
  "bio": "Now specialising in microservices, event-driven architecture, and cloud-native Spring."
}

request.description:
Replaces all editable fields of a mentor profile.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `mentor_id`

Same field constraints as Create Mentor Profile.

**Returns** `MentorDTO`

Permanently deletes a mentor profile.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `mentor_id`

**Returns:** `"mentor deleted with id (1)"`

item.name: 🎓 Students
item.description:
Student profile CRUD.

A user must complete onboarding with role `STUDENT` before creating a student profile via POST.

request.description:
Returns all student profiles.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Returns** `StudentDTO[]`:
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "userId": 3,
    "clerkId": "user_2xyz789",
    "email": "nimal@example.com",
    "firstName": "Nimal",
    "lastName": "Perera",
    "studentCode": "STU001",
    "learningGoals": "Master Spring Boot and REST API design."
  }
]
```

Returns a single student profile by DB ID.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Path variable:** `student_id`

**Returns** `StudentDTO`

Returns all sessions a student is enrolled in.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Path variable:** `student_id`

**Returns** `SessionDTO[]`

Creates a student profile linked to the JWT owner's user account.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Request body — field constraints:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `studentCode` | string | ✅ | 3–20 characters, must be unique across all students |
| `learningGoals` | string | ❌ | Max 2000 characters |

**Returns** `StudentDTO` with HTTP `201 Created`

Updates a student's learning goals.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Path variable:** `student_id`

**Request body:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `learningGoals` | string | ❌ | Max 2000 characters |

**Returns** `StudentDTO`

Permanently deletes a student profile.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Path variable:** `student_id`

**Returns:** `"Student deleted with id (1)"`

item.name: 📚 Subjects
item.description:
Subject management. Subjects are always associated with a mentor.

GET endpoints require a JWT (enforced globally). Write operations require `ADMIN` or `MENTOR`.

request.description:
Returns all subjects with mentor associations.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Returns** `SubjectDTO[]`:
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "subjectName": "Spring Boot Fundamentals",
    "description": "REST APIs with Spring Boot: controllers, services, JPA, security.",
    "mentorId": 1,
    "mentorName": "Rohan Silva",
    "createdAt": "2026-03-01T10:00:00",
    "updatedAt": "2026-03-04T08:00:00"
  }
]
```

Returns a single subject.

**Auth:** Any authenticated user

**Path variable:** `subject_id`

**Returns** `SubjectDTO`

Creates a new subject and assigns it to a mentor.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Request body — field constraints:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | ✅ | 3–100 characters |
| `description` | string | ❌ | Max 1000 characters |
| `mentorId` | number | ✅ | Must be a valid mentor DB ID |

**Returns** `SubjectDTO` with HTTP `201 Created`

Updates the name and description of a subject. Mentor association cannot be changed.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `subject_id`

**Request body:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `name` | string | ✅ | 3–100 characters |
| `description` | string | ❌ | Max 1000 characters |

**Returns** `SubjectDTO`

Permanently deletes a subject.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `subject_id`

**Returns:** `"subjected deleted with id (1)"`

item.name: 📅 Sessions
item.description:
Session scheduling and lifecycle management.

---

**Session Lifecycle:**
```
PENDING → SCHEDULED → STARTED → COMPLETED
                              ↘ CANCELED (any stage)
```

---

**Session Types:**

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `INDIVIDUAL` | One student; server **auto-corrects** `maxParticipants` to `1` |
| `GROUP` | Multiple students; set `maxParticipants` (1–50) |

---

**Business Rules (enforced server-side):**
- `sessionAt` must be a **future** date/time
- All provided `studentIds` must exist in the DB
- Mentor availability is validated against overlapping time slots via `SessionAvailabilityUtil`
- `durationMinutes` accepted range: 15–300
- `maxParticipants` accepted range: 1–50

request.description:
Returns every session in the platform.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Returns** `SessionDTO[]`:
```json
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "mentorId": 1,
    "mentorName": "Rohan Silva",
    "subjectId": 1,
    "subjectName": "Spring Boot Fundamentals",
    "sessionAt": "2026-07-15T10:00:00.000+00:00",
    "durationMinutes": 60,
    "maxParticipants": 1,
    "sessionType": "INDIVIDUAL",
    "sessionStatus": "SCHEDULED",
    "meetingLink": "https://meet.google.com/abc-defg-hij",
    "sessionNotes": null,
    "studentReview": null,
    "studentRating": null
  }
]
```

Returns a single session by DB ID.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `session_id` (must be ≥ 1)

**Returns** `SessionDTO`

Returns all sessions a specific student is enrolled in.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `STUDENT`

**Path variable:** `student_id` (must be ≥ 1)

**Returns** `SessionDTO[]`

Returns all sessions run by a specific mentor.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `mentor_id` (must be ≥ 1)

**Returns** `SessionDTO[]`

Schedules a new mentoring session.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Request body — field constraints:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `studentIds` | number[] | ✅ | At least 1 valid student DB ID |
| `mentorId` | number | ✅ | Valid mentor DB ID |
| `subjectId` | number | ✅ | Valid subject DB ID |
| `sessionType` | string | ✅ | `INDIVIDUAL` \| `GROUP` |
| `maxParticipants` | number | ❌ | 1–50; **auto-set to 1 for INDIVIDUAL** |
| `sessionAt` | ISO 8601 | ✅ | Must be a **future** date/time |
| `durationMinutes` | number | ❌ | 15–300 |

**Example — GROUP session:**
```json
{
  "studentIds": [1, 2, 3],
  "mentorId": 1,
  "subjectId": 1,
  "sessionType": "GROUP",
  "maxParticipants": 10,
  "sessionAt": "2026-08-20T14:00:00.000Z",
  "durationMinutes": 90
}
```

**Returns** `SessionDTO` with HTTP `201 Created`

body.raw:
{
  "sessionAt": "2026-07-20T14:00:00.000Z",
  "durationMinutes": 90,
  "sessionStatus": "SCHEDULED",
  "sessionType": "INDIVIDUAL",
  "maxParticipants": 1,
  "meetingLink": "https://meet.google.com/abc-defg-hij",
  "sessionNotes": "Review Spring Security, JWT internals, and method-level authorization.",
  "studentReview": null,
  "studentRating": null
}

request.description:
Updates fields of an existing session including advancing its status.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `session_id` (must be ≥ 1)

**Request body — field constraints:**

| Field | Type | Required | Rules |
|---|---|---|---|
| `sessionStatus` | string | ✅ | `PENDING` \| `SCHEDULED` \| `STARTED` \| `COMPLETED` \| `CANCELED` |
| `sessionType` | string | ✅ | `INDIVIDUAL` \| `GROUP` |
| `sessionAt` | ISO 8601 | ❌ | Must be future if provided |
| `durationMinutes` | number | ❌ | 15–300 |
| `maxParticipants` | number | ❌ | 1–50 |
| `meetingLink` | string | ❌ | Max 500 characters |
| `sessionNotes` | string | ❌ | Max 2000 characters |
| `studentReview` | string | ❌ | Max 2000 characters |
| `studentRating` | number | ❌ | 1–5 |

---

**Mark session as COMPLETED with review:**
```json
{
  "sessionStatus": "COMPLETED",
  "sessionType": "INDIVIDUAL",
  "studentReview": "Excellent session — very clear explanations!",
  "studentRating": 5
}
```

**Add meeting link (SCHEDULED → ready):**
```json
{
  "sessionStatus": "SCHEDULED",
  "sessionType": "INDIVIDUAL",
  "meetingLink": "https://meet.google.com/xyz-abcd-efg"
}
```

**Returns** `SessionDTO`

Permanently deletes a session.

**Auth:** `ADMIN` | `MENTOR`

**Path variable:** `session_id` (must be ≥ 1)

**Returns:** `"Session deleted successfully with id 1"`
